s: View, save, and share WhatsApp statuses easily
d:
Whatsap Status is a simple and privacy-friendly tool that lets you view, save, and share WhatsApp statuses directly from your device.

Features:
- 💾 Save to Gallery: Download statuses you love permanently to your device storage.
- 📤 Share Instantly: Repost or share statuses with friends on other apps.
- 🎨 Modern UI: Clean, user-friendly interface with support for Dark Mode.
- 🔒 Privacy Focused: Works locally on your device without uploading your data.

Note: This app requires permission to access the .Statuses folder to function correctly. It is not affiliated other apps.
